title: Thaumcraft 6 Pack
description: An assortment of mods for 1.12.2 based primarily on Thaumcraft 6 and its addons.
body:
This is a very sleek and lightweight collection of mods for 1.12.2 using a combination of Thaumcraft 6 and the mods extensive addons, Embers, Tinker's Construct, as well as Immersive Engineering for a simple gameplay experience.

Made for both server and client use with a dedicated server file for an easy to set up server.

Feature mods
[TC4 Research Port](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oldresearch) by SumTingWong886
[Ember's Construct by Peatral](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embersconstruct)

Minecraft's excessive oceans pre-1.13 are greatly reduced with [Some Like It Dry by super_fluke](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/some-like-it-dry)

This modpack is recommended to be used with [Farseek](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farseek)/[Streams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/streams) by delvr and Optifine

By default, the Casting Table is disabled and the mod along with Construct's Armory requires the Ember's Construct stamper to cast tools, this can be disabled by deleting castingtable.zs from "scripts"

Additional attribution links:

[Thaumcraft by Azanor13](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft)

[Baubles By Azanor13](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles)

NOTE: 
1.0 Pre-Release:
- Added Biomes O Plenty mod
- Added Modern Forge Beta Mod
- Added Modern Forge Beta Plus Mod for Beta 1.8.1, Release 1.0, Release 1.1, and Release 1.6.4  Terrain Generation.
- Added Phosphor mod

Make sure to enable Thaumcraft compatibility when generating a Beta world in the "Add-Ons" Section!

Default weight is 0.050 but would recommend to set it higher at 0.100-0.200

NOTE: Embers' golem spawn doesn't seem to be working properly in Modern Forge Beta worlds
